question_text: Will the US enter a recession (two consecutive quarters of negative GDP growth) before January 1, 2027?
description: Resolves YES if the Bureau of Economic Analysis reports two consecutive quarters of negative real GDP growth (annualized) with the second quarter ending before January 1, 2027.

question_text: Will the Federal Reserve cut the federal funds rate to below 4% before July 1, 2026?
description: Resolves YES if the upper bound of the federal funds rate target range falls below 4.00% at any point before July 1, 2026.

question_text: Will GPT-5 (or equivalent next-generation OpenAI model) be publicly released before January 1, 2027?
description: Resolves YES if OpenAI publicly releases a model officially designated as GPT-5 or as the successor to GPT-4/GPT-4o before January 1, 2027. Must be available via API or ChatGPT.

question_text: Will NYC total residential building permits issued in 2026 be lower than in 2025?
description: Resolves YES if the total number of residential building permits issued by NYC DOB in calendar year 2026 is strictly less than the total issued in calendar year 2025.

question_text: Will US core CPI YoY inflation fall below 2.5% at any point before January 2027?
description: Resolves YES if the Bureau of Labor Statistics reports core CPI (all items less food and energy) year-over-year change below 2.5% for any month with data released before January 1, 2027.

question_text: Will any AI system achieve a score above 90% on the ARC-AGI-2 benchmark before 2027?
description: Resolves YES if a published result on the ARC-AGI-2 benchmark exceeds 90% accuracy before January 1, 2027. Must be from a credible source with reproducible methodology.

question_text: Will Zohran Mamdani win the NYC Democratic mayoral primary in June 2025?
description: Resolves YES if Zohran Mamdani wins the most votes in the NYC Democratic mayoral primary election held in June 2025.

question_text: Will the 30-year fixed mortgage rate in the US fall below 6% at any point in 2026?
description: Resolves YES if the Freddie Mac Primary Mortgage Market Survey reports the average 30-year fixed rate below 6.00% for any week in 2026.

question_text: Will the Russia-Ukraine conflict reach a formal ceasefire agreement before 2027?
description: Resolves YES if Russia and Ukraine sign a formal ceasefire agreement before January 1, 2027. Both parties must be signatories.

question_text: Will the NYC Rent Guidelines Board approve a rent freeze (0% increase) for any lease term for the 2026-2027 cycle?
description: Resolves YES if the NYC RGB votes for a 0% increase on either 1-year or 2-year lease renewals for rent-stabilized apartments in the 2026-2027 guideline cycle.
